title: our about us
content:
We Specialize In
Electrical Contracting | Cable Trays | Panel Boards | Solar Structures | Earthing Systems | Electrical Goods & Accessories
Backed by an advanced manufacturing setup and a skilled engineering team, we deliver turnkey electrical solutions for large-scale industries across India.
Our Legacy & Growth Journey
Founder – MJF. V. K. Ramalingam
Shree Sivaa Groups was founded in 1995 with a vision to deliver dependable engineering solutions. In 2007, he established our dedicated cable tray manufacturing unit under the brand KR Power Supports in Coimbatore.
Co-Founder – Mrs. Sumathi Ramalingam (2012)
In 2012, she elevated the company with new product innovations, expanded the cable tray division, and established our in-house powder coating plant. Her leadership scaled the unit 3X and diversified our product portfolio.
Next Generation Leadership
Mr. Sivashankaran Ramalingam (2018) – Introduced Panel Boards, Electrical Components, and launched a dedicated Earthing Solutions division under the brand MARUTHI EARTHINGS. Mr. Sivaraman Ramalingam (2021) – Expanded KR Power Supports with Solar Structures, UPVC Reinforcements, and False Ceiling Channels.
Today, two generations work together to build our flagship brand:
“KR CABLE TRAYS”
What We Do
Electrical Contracting & Industrial Solutions
We execute complete electrical installations, panel works, and industrial power infrastructure for major sectors across India.
Hospitals
Textile Mills
Sugar Plants
Paper Mills
Foundries
Engineering Industries
Cement Plants
Thermal Power Plants
Commercial Complexes
Co-Generation Plants
Large Industrial Facilities
Products We Manufacture
Delivering high-quality electrical infrastructure products for industries across India.
1. Cable Trays
- Perforated Cable Trays
- Ladder Type Cable Trays
- Raceway Cable Trays
- Mesh Cable Trays
- FRP Cable Trays
2. Panel Boards
- Complete range based on industry standards
3. Solar Structures
- MSS Solar Module Mounting Structures
4. Flats
- GI Flats
- Hot Dip Galvanized Flats
- Copper Flats
- Aluminium Flats
5. Earthing Systems
- Complete Earthing Management Solutions
- Electrodes, Backfills, & Accessories
- (Manufactured in partnership with MARUTHI EARTHINGS)
6. Clamps & Accessories
- All Types of Steel Clamps
- Cable Tray Clamps
- Support Brackets & Hardware
7. UPVC Reinforcement
- Structure-based reinforcements (as per sample requirements)
- False Ceiling Channels
8. Electrical Goods & Accessories
- Industrial-grade electrical components & accessories
Why Choose Us
- - 30+ Years of Industry Excellence
- - ISO-Grade Manufacturing Standards
- - Dedicated R&D and Quality Testing
- - Timely Delivery & Pan-India Service
- - Skilled Team of Engineers, Supervisors & Technicians
- - Customer-First Approach with Transparent Work Process
Our success is built on quality, commitment, and innovation. Through continual improvement and strong leadership, KR Power Supports stands firm as a trusted partner for industries across India.

title: Careers || KR Power - Join Our Team
content:
Join Our Team of Power Innovators
Build your career with KR Power — where ideas light up the future. Explore opportunities to grow, learn, and make an impact in the world of electrical and solar systems.
WHY JOIN US
Why Work With KR Power?
We value people who want to build reliable power systems and sustainable solar solutions. Join a team that invests in your growth and safety.
- Growth opportunities on large projects
- Collaborative and supportive team culture
- Hands-on experience with advanced power technologies
- Strong emphasis on safety and quality
120+
Projects Delivered
50+
Panel Types
200+
Team Members
10+
Years Experience
CAREER OPPORTUNITIES
Current Openings
Explore exciting career opportunities and join our team of professionals.
WORKPLACE CULTURE
Life at KR Power
A day on-site — teamwork, learning, and hands-on work with power systems.
JOIN OUR TEAM
Apply Now
Submit your application and our HR team will review it.
